item.title: 140 kg (48% fat) - 86 kg (12-13% fat)
item.description: 6-7 years in the making. Turning 49 on March 31st. Never ever give up! P.S I do use Snapchat if people want to see my fitness journey. Username is ace1973 or Instagram: robertoficeland :) Thank for all the comments. It's nice to see a decent community who supports one another! :)
item.dc:creator: bobbyperu1973

item.title: A Song of Ice and Fire
item.dc:creator: funkystay

item.title: Every year, local communities on both sides of the Apurimac River Canyon rebuild the Q'eswachaka Bridge
item.description: The old bridge is torn down and the new bridge is built in just three days using traditional Inka engineering techniques. Full video: https://youtu.be/dql-D6JQ1Bc
item.dc:creator: vidadobl6

item.dc:creator: marcgxn

item.title: It's the little things that count.....
item.dc:creator: MissDeeMeanor

item.title: I’m one of the burn pit veterans
item.description: As a Marine Corps veteran who was directly exposed on two of my deployments, this disgusts me. My first deployment (2008) we had to burn our own pit only 75yds from our living area for trash and human waste, as in I was part of working parties that lit our own pits. On my second deployment (2010-2011) we were only 100yds away. I struggle with constant sinusitis, breathing issues, and it just keeps getting worse. How can this be a partisan issue? How is this even a question of support? These are rhetorical questions, I know why. But still, I don't understand how someone can look at themselves in the mirror every morning and feel good about voting against. Source: https://www.congress.gov/bill/117th-congress/house-bill/3967 Source: https://www.govtrack.us/congress/votes/117-2022/h57 Edit: Damn, Most Viral? Thank you all so much. Don't send anything, just vote... please.
item.dc:creator: swc0806

item.title: I made it past boards
item.description: After 2 long years of nursing school with enough time to get 1 other degree, an adaptive test that can go anywhere from 75-145 questions, I have done it. Thank you Imgur for all the memes and inspirational posts. I hope everyone has a wonderful time today.
item.dc:creator: alrightalpaca

item.title: The portrait of Mona Lisa was created by AI technology from 9 different paintings called "Abandoned Civilization".
item.description: The portrait of Mona Lisa was created by AI technology from 9 different paintings called "Abandoned Civilization". The artificial intelligence work is made by TDRAW_AI_Art(@tdraw_ai_art)

item.title: Day 289: of cheeseburgers I want inside of me

Map of all burger spots that are available on yelp! Big thanks to @OhBoyDoIHaveNews4U for this. Link to his post and map https://imgur.com/gallery/vcObDuD
